# Microvectors AI - AI Driven Sales & Revenue Acceleration

## About
Microvectors provides AI-driven sales, lead generation, and revenue operations solutions for B2B tech companies. We accelerate revenue through intelligent automation, context-aware analytics, and demand pulse tracking.

## Important Links
- Home: https://microvectors.com/
- Solutions: https://microvectors.com/solutions
- Company: https://microvectors.com/company
- Resources: https://microvectors.com/resources

## Features
- AI Lead Generation & Nurturing
- Behaviour Analytics
- Demand Discovery
- Revenue Acceleration

For detailed API or technical constraints, please refer to our main documentation.
